title: South Africa condemns 'fake videos' of alleged xenophobic attacks

originalTitle: Rwandan singer dies as he was being released from prison
title: Sad News: A Kind Musician from Rwanda Goes to Be With the Stars
content:
Hello, amazing friends! Your kid-friendly news reporter from our beautiful continent, Africa, is here. Today, I have some sad news to share with you from a country called Rwanda. It's a land of a thousand hills and beautiful music.

A Special Musician Named Kizito

There was a very special musician in Rwanda. His name was Kizito Mihigo. He was a wonderful singer, and many people loved his songs. His music touched the hearts of many, many people across Rwanda and even in other parts of Africa. Kizito was not just a singer; he was also like a teacher. He went to university and learned many things. He used his voice and his songs to share important messages with everyone. He sang about peace, forgiveness, and hope. Did you know? Music is like magic! It can make you feel happy, sad, or even brave. Kizito's music often made people think about how we can all be kinder to each other.

What Happened to Kizito?

We have some very sad news about Kizito. He was in a place called prison for some time. A prison is a place where people stay if they have broken big rules, or sometimes, if leaders think they have done something wrong, even if they were just sharing their ideas. Kizito was going to leave the prison soon. He was supposed to go home to his family and friends. Everyone was excited for him to come back. But then, something very, very sad happened. Just as he was getting ready to be free, Kizito passed away. It was a very sad day for many people in Rwanda and beyond. Many people are feeling very sad and are remembering Kizito's beautiful music and kind spirit.

What is a Musician?

A musician is a person who creates or plays music. They might sing, play a guitar, a drum, or a piano. Musicians like Kizito share their feelings and stories through their songs. They can make us dance, smile, or even feel like we are not alone. Did you know? In many parts of Africa, music is a very big part of life! We sing when we are happy, when we are sad, when we are working, and when we are celebrating. Music brings us all closer. Kizito's songs were very special. He sang about things that were important to him. Sometimes, his songs made people think about how things could be better in their country. He believed in speaking up with love and peace.

About Rwanda

Rwanda is a beautiful country in East Africa. It is sometimes called the 'Land of a Thousand Hills' because there are so many green hills and mountains. The people of Rwanda are very strong and have worked hard to make their country a good place to live. They have amazing food, colourful clothes, and lovely dances. Music is a very important part of Rwandan culture, just like it is in many other African countries. Kizito was one of the bright stars of Rwandan music. Did you know? Rwanda is famous for its mountain gorillas! Many people visit Rwanda to see these gentle giants in their natural homes.

Remembering Kizito's Music

Even though Kizito is no longer with us, his music will live on forever. His songs will still be played on the radio, and people will still sing along to his beautiful words. When someone special like Kizito leaves us, we can remember them by listening to their songs and remembering the good things they did. It is okay to feel sad when someone important passes away. But we can also remember the joy they brought into the world. Kizito brought a lot of joy and made many people feel hopeful with his amazing voice. Why Matters: Kizito Mihigo was a singer who used his music to share important messages of peace and hope. His passing is very sad news, and it reminds us how important it is for everyone to be able to share their ideas peacefully through things like music. Let's all remember Kizito and the power of music to bring us together and help us think about a better world. Be kind to each other, listen to new music, and always share your good ideas with the world, just like Kizito did. Thank you for listening, my friends.
summary: Kizito Mihigo, a beloved Rwandan singer who shared messages of peace and hope through his music, sadly passed away just as he was about to be released from prison, leaving many people in Rwanda very sad.
whyMatters: Kizito Mihigo was a singer who used his music to share important messages of peace and hope. His passing is very sad news, and it reminds us how important it is for everyone to be able to share their ideas peacefully through things like music.

title: 'He didn't hit me, I didn't hit him' - Valverde speaks as Real take action
